title: Ayutthaya, Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ayutthaya, Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ayutthaya is a city in Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya with a population of 80,000. A UNESCO World Heritage city just north of Bangkok, rich in history with ancient temple ruins, and offering a much more affordable lifestyle than the capital.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
